ADEA.name: Adeia Inc.
ADEA.blurb: Adeia Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a media and semiconductor intellectual property licensing platform company in the United States, Asia, Canada, Europe, the Middle East, and internationally.

AGX.name: Argan, Inc.
AGX.blurb: Argan, Inc., through its subsidiaries, provides engineering, procurement, construction, commissioning, maintenance, project development, and technical consulting services to the power generation market in the United States, Republic of Ireland, and the United Kingdom.

ALAB.name: Astera Labs, Inc.
ALAB.blurb: Astera Labs, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells semiconductor-based connectivity solutions for cloud and AI infrastructure in Taiwan and the United States.

ALTO.name: Alto Ingredients, Inc.
ALTO.blurb: Alto Ingredients, Inc. produces, distributes, and markets specialty alcohols, renewable fuel, and essential ingredients in the United States.

AMSC.name: American Superconductor Corporation
AMSC.blurb: American Superconductor Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, provides megawatt-scale power resiliency solutions worldwide. The company operates through two segments: Grid and Wind segments.

APLS.name: Apellis Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
APLS.blurb: Apellis Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialization of novel therapeutic compounds to treat diseases with high unmet needs.

ATEN.name: A10 Networks, Inc.
ATEN.blurb: A10 Networks, Inc. provides secure application and network infrastructure solutions in the United States, the rest of Americas, Japan, rest of the Asia Pacific, Europe, the Middle East, and Africa.

ATI.name: ATI Inc.
ATI.blurb: ATI Inc. produces and sells specialty materials and complex components worldwide.

ATRO.name: Astronics Corporation

AYA.name: Aya Gold & Silver Inc.
AYA.blurb: Aya Gold & Silver Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration, evaluation, and development of precious metals projects in Morocco. The company primarily explores for gold and silver deposits.

CBL.name: CBL & Associates Properties, Inc.

CLS.name: Celestica Inc.

CMBT.name: Cmb.Tech NV
CMBT.blurb: Cmb.Tech NV engages in marine transportation business in Belgium. It operates through three divisions: Marine, H2 Infra, and H2 Industry.

CRDO.name: Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd
CRDO.blurb: Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd provides various high-speed connectivity solutions for optical and electrical Ethernet and PCIe applications in the United States, Taiwan, Mainland China, Hong Kong, and other international markets.

DY.name: Dycom Industries, Inc.
DY.blurb: Dycom Industries, Inc. provides specialty contracting services to the digital infrastructure, telecommunications infrastructure, and utility industries in the United States.

ELMD.name: Electromed, Inc.
ELMD.blurb: Electromed, Inc. develops, manufactures, markets, and sells airway clearance therapy and related products that apply high frequency chest wall oscillation (HFCWO) therapy in pulmonary care for patients in the United States and internationally.

ENS.name: EnerSys
ENS.blurb: EnerSys engages in the provision of stored energy solutions for industrial applications worldwide. It operates through three segments: Network & Infrastructure Solutions, Industrial Mobility Solutions, and Precision Power Solutions.

FLXS.name: Flexsteel Industries, Inc.
FLXS.blurb: Flexsteel Industries, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, distributes, imports, and markets residential furniture products in the United States. FSLR.name: First Solar, Inc.
FSLR.blurb: First Solar, Inc., a solar technology company, provides photovoltaic (PV) solar energy solutions in the United States, France, India, Chile, and internationally. The company manufactures and sells PV solar modules with thin film semiconductor technology that provides conventional crystalline silicon PV solar modules.

FTI.name: TechnipFMC plc
FTI.blurb: TechnipFMC plc engages in the oil and natural gas projects, technologies, systems, and services businesses in Europe, Central Asia, North America, Latin America, the Asia Pacific, Africa, the Middle East, and internationally.

FTNT.name: Fortinet, Inc.
FTNT.blurb: Fortinet, Inc. provides cybersecurity and convergence of networking and security solutions worldwide.

GCT.name: GigaCloud Technology Inc.
GCT.blurb: GigaCloud Technology Inc. provides end-to-end B2B ecommerce solutions for large parcel merchandise in the United States and internationally.

GEV.name: GE Vernova Inc.
GEV.blurb: GE Vernova Inc., an energy company, engages in the provision of various products and services that generate, transfer, orchestrate, convert, and store electricity in the United States, Europe, Asia, the Middle East, and Africa.

HBM.name: Hudbay Minerals Inc.
HBM.blurb: Hudbay Minerals Inc., a diversified mining company, focuses on the exploration, development, operation, and optimization of properties in North and South America. It primarily explores for copper concentrates containing copper, gold, zinc, molybdenum concentrates, and silver.

HSHP.name: Himalaya Shipping Ltd.
HSHP.blurb: Himalaya Shipping Ltd. provides dry bulk shipping services worldwide.

HWM.name: Howmet Aerospace Inc.
HWM.blurb: Howmet Aerospace Inc. provides advanced engineered solutions for the aerospace and transportation industries in the United States, Japan, France, Germany, the United Kingdom, Mexico, Italy, Canada, Poland, China, and internationally.

INOD.name: Innodata Inc.
INOD.blurb: Innodata Inc. operates as a data engineering company in the United States, the United Kingdom, the Netherlands, Canada, Germany, Belgium, and internationally.

KLIC.name: Kulicke and Soffa Industries, Inc.
KLIC.blurb: Kulicke and Soffa Industries, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells capital equipment and consumables in China, the United States, Taiwan, Malaysia, Japan, the Philippines, Korea, Hong Kong, and internationally.

KRYS.name: Krystal Biotech, Inc.
KRYS.blurb: Krystal Biotech, Inc., a commercial-stage biotechnology company, discovers, develops, manufactures, and commercializes genetic medicines to treat diseases with high unmet medical needs in the United States.

MAKO.name: Mako Mining Corp.

MCY.name: Mercury General Corporation
MCY.blurb: Mercury General Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in writing personal automobile insurance in the United States. It also writes homeowners, commercial automobile, commercial property, mechanical protection, and umbrella insurance products.

MRVL.name: Marvell Technology, Inc.
MRVL.blurb: Marvell Technology, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides data infrastructure semiconductor solutions and spanning the data center core to network edge in the United States, Argentina, China, India, Israel, Japan, Singapore, South Korea, Taiwan, Vietnam, and internationally.

MTZ.name: MasTec, Inc.
MTZ.blurb: MasTec, Inc., an infrastructure engineering and construction company, provides engineering, building, installation, maintenance, and upgrade services for communications, energy, utility, and other infrastructure primarily in the United States and Canada.

NBIS.name: Nebius Group N.V.
NBIS.blurb: Nebius Group N.V., a technology company, engages in building full-stack infrastructure to service the global AI industry in the United States, the United Kingdom, and internationally.

NEXA.name: Nexa Resources S.A.
NEXA.blurb: Nexa Resources S.A., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the zinc mining and smelting business worldwide. The company operates in two segments, Mining and Smelting.

NUTX.name: Nutex Health Inc.
NUTX.blurb: Nutex Health Inc. operates as a healthcare services and operations company in the United States.

OUT.name: OUTFRONT Media Inc.
OUT.blurb: OUTFRONT Media Inc. is one of the largest and most trusted out-of-home media companies in the U.S., helping brands connect with audiences in the moments and environments that matter most.

PARR.name: Par Pacific Holdings, Inc.
PARR.blurb: Par Pacific Holdings, Inc., an energy company, provides renewable and conventional fuels in the United States. The company operates through three segments: Refining, Retail, and Logistics.

PPIH.name: Perma-Pipe International Holdings, Inc.
PPIH.blurb: Perma-Pipe International Holdings, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, designs, engineers, manufactures, and sells specialty piping and leak detection systems in the United States, Canada, the United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia, and internationally.

RILY.name: BRC Group Holdings, Inc.
RILY.blurb: BRC Group Holdings, Inc., through its subsidiaries, provides financial services in North America, Australia, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, Asia, and Latin America. The Capital Markets segment offers investment banking and institutional brokerage services; direct lending services to middle market companies; and eq…

RSI.name: Rush Street Interactive, Inc.
RSI.blurb: Rush Street Interactive, Inc. operates as an online casino and sports betting company in the United States, Canada, and Latin America.

SIF.name: SIFCO Industries, Inc.
SIF.blurb: SIFCO Industries, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells forgings and machined components primarily for the aerospace and energy, and defense and commercial space markets in the United States and internationally.

STRL.name: Sterling Infrastructure, Inc.
STRL.blurb: Sterling Infrastructure, Inc. engages in the provision of e-infrastructure, transportation, and building solutions in the United States.

STX.name: Seagate Technology Holdings plc
STX.blurb: Seagate Technology Holdings plc engages in the provision of data storage technology and infrastructure solutions in Singapore, the United States, the Netherlands, and internationally.

TDC.name: Teradata Corporation
TDC.blurb: Teradata Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, provides an AI and knowledge platforms in the United States and internationally. It operates in two segments, Product Sales and Consulting Services.

TGTX.name: TG Therapeutics, Inc.
TGTX.blurb: TG Therapeutics, Inc., a commercial stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on the acquisition, development, and commercialization of novel treatments for B-cell mediated diseases in the United States and internationally.

TTMI.name: TTM Technologies, Inc.
TTMI.blurb: TTM Technologies, Inc. manufactures and sells mission systems, radio frequency (RF) components, RF microwave/microelectronic assemblies, and printed circuit boards (PCBs) and substrates in the United States, Taiwan, and internationally.

VIAV.name: Viavi Solutions Inc.
VIAV.blurb: Viavi Solutions Inc. provides network test, monitoring, and assurance solutions for telecommunications, cloud, enterprises, first responders, military, aerospace, and critical infrastructures in the Americas, the Asia-Pacific, Europe, the Middle East, and Africa.

VICR.name: Vicor Corporation
VICR.blurb: Vicor Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, designs, develops, manufactures, and markets modular power components and power systems for converting electrical power for use in electrically powered devices in the United States, Europe, the Asia Pacific, and internationally.

VIK.name: Viking Holdings Ltd
VIK.blurb: Viking Holdings Ltd focused on providing passenger cruises in North America, the United Kingdom, and internationally. It operates through the River and Ocean segments.

VRT.name: Vertiv Holdings Co
VRT.blurb: Vertiv Holdings Co designs, manufactures, and services critical digital infrastructure technologies and life cycle services for data centers, communication networks, and commercial and industrial environments in the Americas, the Asia Pacific, Europe, the Middle East, and Africa.

WDC.name: Western Digital Corporation
WDC.blurb: Western Digital Corporation develops, manufactures, and sells data storage devices and solutions based on hard disk drive (HDD) technology in the United States, Asia, Europe, the Middle East, and Africa.

XOMA.name: XOMA Royalty Corporation
XOMA.blurb: XOMA Royalty Corporation operates as a biotech royalty aggregator in the United States, Switzerland, the Asia Pacific, and Australia. It has a portfolio of economic rights to future potential milestone and royalty payments associated with commercial products and pre-commercial therapeutic candidates.

YOU.name: Clear Secure, Inc.
YOU.blurb: Clear Secure, Inc. operates a secure identity platform under the CLEAR brand name primarily in the United States.

ZVRA.name: Zevra Therapeutics, Inc.
ZVRA.blurb: Zevra Therapeutics, Inc., a commercial-stage company, focuses on addressing unmet needs for the treatment of rare diseases in the United States. The company develops its products through Ligand Activated Technology platform.
